additionalProperties.name: relatedApplications
additionalProperties.value: Applications of the term in laser cleaning

definition.prompt: Write a comprehensive technical definition of {subject} in the context of laser cleaning. Include its scientific basis, significance in the laser cleaning process, relevant physical or chemical principles, and any applicable equations or standards (e.g., ASTM, ISO). Keep it precise and informative (150-200 words).

usage.prompt: Explain how the term {subject} is applied in practical laser cleaning scenarios. Include specific industries (e.g., automotive, aerospace), materials (e.g., metals, composites), and contexts where the term is critical. Provide examples of its role in processes or outcomes, with quantitative data where possible (200-250 words).

technicalDetails.prompt: Provide detailed technical information about {subject}, including quantitative metrics (e.g., ranges, units), scientific principles, and its influence on laser cleaning performance. Include relevant equations, standards (e.g., ASTM D7091, ISO), or testing protocols, and cite data sources (200-250 words).

relatedTerms.prompt: Describe terms related to {subject} in the context of laser cleaning, including their definitions, relationships to {subject}, and importance for understanding the concept. Provide examples of how these terms interact in practical applications, with references to standards or research where applicable (150-200 words).

practicalExamples.prompt: Provide real-world examples or case studies where {subject} plays a critical role in laser cleaning applications. Include specific industries, materials, processes, and quantitative outcomes (e.g., efficiency improvements, cost savings). Highlight any certifications or standards achieved (200-250 words).

environmentalImpact.prompt: Analyze the environmental impact of {subject} in laser cleaning, including its role in reducing chemical waste, improving energy efficiency, or supporting sustainability goals. Provide quantitative metrics (e.g., waste reduction percentages) and examples where possible (150-200 words).

researchContext.prompt: Discuss the research context of {subject} in laser cleaning, including key studies, papers, or patents. Highlight contributions from academic or industry research, ongoing developments, and their impact on the field (150-200 words).

businessImplications.prompt: Analyze the business implications of {subject} in laser cleaning, including its impact on cost, efficiency, scalability, or market adoption. Discuss how understanding this term influences decision-making in industries adopting laser cleaning (150-200 words).

description.description: Technical definition of the term in the context of laser cleaning
description.example: Fluence is the energy delivered per unit area (J/cm²) in laser cleaning, critical for controlling ablation efficiency.
